name: numbering-indent-partial-override
description: Numbering level has left=1440, hanging=360. Paragraph has direct w:ind with only w:left=720. Element-level override means the numbering hanging should NOT leak through.
expected_behavior: P0: left=720, first_line=None (element-level override). P1: left=1440, first_line=-360 (numbering only, control).
